name: @visuelconcept/wui-poseidon
description: Poseidon — standalone WinCC OA WebUI page for wastewater-treatment-plant (WWTP) supervision: activated-sludge process synoptic, KPI dashboard (removal efficiencies + discharge conformity + specific energy), historical trends, threshold alarms with acknowledgement, and equipment control (start/stop/auto-manual with confirmation + GxP audit-trail tracing). Live values from the poseidon simulator manager; control + KPI/report summaries via /api/poseidon.
